name: n8n
description: Reads n8n workflows, executions, tags, users, variables, projects, data tables, and credential metadata; writes supported n8n public REST API mutations.

risk.read: external n8n instance API read of workflow, execution, tag, user, variable, project, data table, and credential metadata
risk.write: external n8n instance API mutation of workflows, executions, tags, variables, projects, data tables, source-control pull, audit generation, and credential tests/transfers
